query: 现在每一轮的context 已经能够正常gc了么

transcript.content: 新的对话，也还是在umc项目里， 为什么context数据不对；
现在每一轮的context 已经能够正常gc了么

不是“每一轮都会压缩”，但现在看起来已经是“每一轮都会评估，满足条件就正常 GC 应用”。 这轮之所以没压，是因为这是新对话，抽出来的 turn 不够。代码里 `minTurns` 默认是 `3`，少于 3 就直接 `not_enough_turns`，见 [src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/cod…

decision.archive_summary: User asked why context data looked wrong in a new UMC chat, then clarified whether per-turn context GC is now working normally. Assistant answered that GC is evaluated each turn but only applied when conditions are met; in this case it did not compress because the new conversation had too few turns and hit the default `minTurns=3` / `not_enough_turns` path.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active question appears answered, with no remaining implementation task or follow-up dependency. The latest user turn `t2` is automatically kept, and older raw turns are not needed for the next turn. There are no durable user preferences or standing instructions in this transcript that need semantic pinning.
